title: IVR - Genshin Train Pack
description: IVR - Genshin Train Pack, contains KCRC and MTRC Trains HD Model with Genshin Impact Outfits for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
![IVR - Integrated Train Pack Subpack Contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3ab98e9489ae6663bc48a8361b936fba2efe8a9.png) ![Keqing Train Interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5744d0aa8327df275528fb2b4b03da0d859ef99d.jpeg)

**Overview**
--- ![Genshin Train Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc85cfa16e57f8a68db5d72b7b4243376e123991.png) This pack main features Genshin Impact Outfit KCR Trains.
此高清材質包內含有：九廣鐵路-第三代電氣化列車 (原神塗裝)
All trains contain textures in 3 levels of resolution.
所有列車皆包括1x,3x,5x材質解像度
**Before Download 下載須知**
--- No modification and republish is allowed without the author's consent.
未經作者許可，禁止編輯及再發佈作品
**NTE Preload Optimisation** --- This resourcepack support NTE preload function, enable **NTE Preload** function to get smoother gameplay experience.
Please make sure NTE version is v.0.5.1 or above.
這材質包支持NTE預加載功能，可有效降低電腦效能負荷，NTE版本需要v.0.5.1或以上。
**IVR Packs** --- ![IVR PACK v8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4027e20f1283595bb8707fdc5de0867e234b477b_0.webp) **Train List 列車列表：**
--- ![Keqing Train Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e0634c3c856320b4525de248e3dec9b403431d1.png) ![Ganyu Train Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35332366ff952cb656f3f90a9cab3771800eb7a7.png) ![Kokomi Train Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe98d76f2e401f00f94091dadc1c1174a5519987.png) ![Nahida Train Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb53ecf32d6bb578f5acdf463974b2e218236a92.png) 1. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Keqing/刻晴) with VA charms
2. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Ganyu/甘雨)
3. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Kokomi/心海)
4. [Genshin] MTR IKK-Train (Kokomi/心海)
5. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Nahida/納西妲) with VA charms
6. [Genshin] MTR IKK-Train (Nahida/納西妲) with VA charms
7. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Nahida/納西妲) (Door Indicator, Both) with VA charms
8. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Nahida/納西妲) (Door Indicator, Exterior) with VA charms
9. [Genshin] KCR Millennium Train (Nahida/納西妲) (Door Indicator, Interior) with VA charms
